creator: adrian@freebsd.org
text:
I've just updated to the latest 9-stable pre-release binary package set (from bapt) and although chromium works, it won't let me click on various things.

The big one in question is gmail - it won't let me click on emails in gmail. Buttons are fine. Just not window items that aren't links.

Installed version:

adrian@lucy:~]> pkg info | grep chrom
chromium-28.0.1500.71_1        Mostly BSD-licensed web browser based on WebKit and Gtk+
xf86-video-openchrome-0.3.3    X.Org openChrome display driver
